title: cladanthus mixtus
intro: Cladanthus mixtus, also known as Chrysanthemum arcticum or Arctic Chrysanthemum, is a perennial plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the Arctic and subarctic regions. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cladanthus mixtus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits.
